headline: Amazon vs. Walmart: The Retail War Just Picked a Winner
summary: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) and Walmart (NYSE:WMT) reported earnings revealing two companies of nearly identical scale but radically different profit architectures. Amazon closed fiscal 2025 with annual revenue of $716.92 billion, while Walmart finished fiscal 2026 with $713.16 billion. The revenue gap is negligible, but the strategy gap is enormous. AWS Carries Amazon. Omnichannel Carries Walmart. Amazon’s ... Amazon vs. Walmart: The Retail War Just Picked a Winner

headline: Rigetti’s 108 Qubit Launch Tests Quantum Ambitions And Valuation Gap
summary: Rigetti Computing has released its 108 qubit modular quantum system, Cepheus-1-108Q, for general availability. The system is now accessible through Rigetti's own cloud platform and Amazon Braket. The launch highlights technical advances in scalability and fidelity and marks a new phase in Rigetti's commercial rollout of higher qubit systems. Rigetti Computing, NasdaqCM:RGTI, now has its Cepheus-1-108Q system available to customers and partners at a time when its share price stands at...

headline: VTSAX vs VOO ETF: Which Vanguard Fund Should You Buy in 2026?

headline: Hims And Hers Confronts Amazon Threat While Advancing AI Weight Loss Plan
summary: Amazon Pharmacy has entered the weight loss medication market with Eli Lilly’s new GLP-1 drug, offering same day delivery and raising competitive pressure on Hims & Hers Health (NYSE:HIMS).
